title: When rootless mode and systemd-home with LUKS, my decision
body:
I`m using arch, systemd-home with LUKS and podman with rootless mode.
/etc/passwd do not contain my user due to settings /etc/nsswitch.conf

 ```
passwd: compat systemd
group: files [SUCCESS=merge] systemd
shadow: compat systemd
gshadow: compat systemd

publickey: files

hosts: mymachines resolve [!UNAVAIL=return] files myhostname dns
networks: files

protocols: files
services: files
ethers: files
rpc: files

netgroup: files
```

My decision [patch](https://gist.github.com/denisoster/88a013adca06a9ca6e2af44a0e8dc591)

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out, @denisoster.

Can you elaborate on what you request in this issue?
since there is no action to take from the Podman side and the fix affects only the OCI runtime, I am closing it.

I have been struggling all morning to setup my podman rootless to be used by toolbox or distorbox but apparently after a lot of struggling I found it the issue was due to LUKS where the overlay was mounted. I'm sure there is a way mount on luks mount point because my former computer can but I dont remember how .. anyone ?
